finding_results.notes: The suspect build now spells out the concrete reasons Anya flags Dreher: repeated annex pulls, unresolved section-code printer releases, and absences aligned to leak windows. The exoneration now explicitly clears each datapoint through oncology surveillance, legitimate Baltic tasking, recovered hard-copy binders, clean metadata/finance checks, and the wider circulation chain that keeps the mole elsewhere.

Expanded the chapter with causally necessary investigation, false-positive aftermath, Falk paper-trail escalation, and Damian strategy material while preserving the heading contract. Verified post-revision chapter length at 5183 words.
